name: Sign Editor Open
desc: Opens the sign editor GUI for a specific sign position.

implementation.overview: S36 opens the sign editing GUI. AutoSign modules detect this and immediately send C12PacketUpdateSign with predefined text (and optionally close the GUI). Jigsaw 0.26 uses this for OPSign exploit.

modules.name: AutoSign / OPSign
modules.purpose: Detect sign editor open and auto-fill text or trigger exploit.
